properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord clean my mind Let it keep a pure thoughts And let it have the mindset that You alone should be glorified That's all I should do, until this journey is done

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are there when I am weak Lord You hear me when I can't speak You are there to remind me that I can overcome and all of these tears will be worth it in the finish line

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord fix and mend my heart Fill it with Your Perfect Love And let that Love come through For I can't love as perfect as You can do

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are there when I am weak Lord You hear me when I can't speak You are there to remind me that I can overcome and all of these tears will be worth it in the finish line

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lord, I want to be a blessing Oh I want to walk Your ways But there are paths, that I can't walk alone I need Your hand to lead me the right direction

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are there when I am weak Lord You hear me when I can't speak You are there to remind me that I can overcome and all of these tears will be worth it in the finish line

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Help me quit this old cycle of life I want to come out from this wrong transition I want something new I don't want to end up in Judges I want now to go through Ruth Help me dear Lord I can't do this alone Help me lose the chain that binds me today, until the day that I'll be home

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Lord Youre there when I am weak Lord You hear me when I can't speak You are there to remind me that I can overcome and all of these tears will be worth it in the finish line And I'll meet You there, on that line
